2800.full_name: 'Uthman bin Talha bin Abi Talha b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. 'Uthman b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Qusayy b. Kilab
2800.arabic: عثمان بن طلحة بن أبي طلحة
2800.mother_name: al-Salafa Sughra bint Sa'd from Ansar
2800.bio: His Father (Thalha), Uncles('Uthman, Abu Sa'id) and brothers(al-Harith,Kilab,Musafi', al-Julas) died as disbeliever in the battle of Uhud.

2801.full_name: Shayba bin 'Uthman bin Abi Talha b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. 'Uthman b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Qusayy b. Kilab
2801.mother_name: al-Salafa Sughra bint Sa'd from Ansar
2801.bio: His father was killed at Uhud as disbeliever.

2802.full_name: Safiyya bint Shayba bin 'Uthman bin Abi Talha b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. 'Uthman b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Qusayy
2802.arabic: صفية بنت شيبة بن عثمان العبدرية

2803.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin Shayba b. 'Uthman b. Abi Talha b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. 'Uthman b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Qusayy
2803.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن شيبة بن عثمان الحجبي
2803.bio: He was care taker of Ka'ba.

2804.full_name: Mus'ub/Muslim bin Shayba b. 'Uthman b. Abi Talha b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. 'Uthman b. 'Abd al-Dar
2804.arabic: مصعب بن شيبة بن عثمان الحجبي

2805.full_name: Umm 'Uthman bint Sufyan or Umm Walad Shayba bin 'Uthman
2805.arabic: أم عثمان بنت سفيان/ أم ولد شيبة

2806.full_name: Wahb bin 'Uthman bin Abi Talha b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. 'Uthman b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Qusayy b. Kilab
2806.arabic: وهب بن عثمان بن أبي طلحة العبدري
2806.mother_name: al-Salafa Sughra bint Sa'd from Ansar
2806.bio: His father was killed at Uhud as disbeliever.

2808.full_name: Barra bint Aba Tajra bin Abi Fukayha (Yasar)

2809.full_name: Habiba bint Aba Tajra bin Abi Fukayha (Yasar)

2810.full_name: Abu Tajra bin Abi Fukayha (Yasar), a client of B.'Abd al-Dar

2811.full_name: 'Aziza bint Aba Tajra bin Abi Fukayha (Yasar)

2812.full_name: Tumadir from B.Shayba bin 'Uthman of B.'Anbd al-Dar

2813.full_name: Safiyya bint al-Harith b. Talha b. Abi Talha b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. 'Uthman b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Qusayy
2813.father_name: al-Harith b. Talha b. Abi Talha
2813.bio: Her Father (al-Harith), Uncles (Kilab,Musafi', al-Julas) and grand fathers died as disbeliever in the battle of Uhud.

2814.full_name: Talha bin al-Harith b. Talha b. Abi Talha b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. 'Uthman b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Qusayy
2814.arabic: طلحة بن الحارث بن طلحة العبدري
2814.father_name: al-Harith b. Talha b. Abi Talha
2814.bio: His Father (al-Harith), Uncles (Kilab,Musafi', al-Julas) and grand fathers died as disbeliever in the battle of Uhud.

2815.full_name: 'Alqama bin Talha bin Abi Talha b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. 'Uthman b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Qusayy b. Kilab
2815.arabic: علقمة بن طلحة بن أبي طلحة العبدري
2815.mother_name: al-Salafa Sughra bint Sa'd from Ansar
2815.bio: His Father (Thalha), Uncles('Uthman, Abu Sa'id) and brothers(al-Harith,Kilab,Musafi', al-Julas) died as disbeliever in the battle of Uhud.

2816.full_name: 'Abdullah bin Musafi' b. Talha b. Abi Talha b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. 'Uthman b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Qusayy
2816.arabic: عبد الله بن مسافع بن طلحة
2816.father_name: Musafi' b. Talha b. Abi Talha
2816.mother_name: Salma bint Qatn from B.Bakr b.Wa'il
2816.bio: His Father (Musafi'), Uncles (Kilab, al-Julas,al-Harith) and grand fathers died as disbeliever in the battle of Uhud.

2817.full_name: Yazid bin Musafi' b. Talha b. Abi Talha b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. 'Uthman b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Qusayy
2817.father_name: Musafi' b. Talha b. Abi Talha
2817.mother_name: Salma bint Qatn from B.Bakr b.Wa'il
2817.bio: His Father (Musafi'), Uncles (Kilab, al-Julas,al-Harith) and grand fathers died as disbeliever in the battle of Uhud.
